desc: Opens the Warning Manager window — a WebView2 panel showing Revit model warnings side by side with BUILD X command warnings, plus a tool errors section below.
summary: Opens the Warning Manager window — a WebView2 panel showing Revit model warnings side by side with BUILD X command warnings, plus a tool errors section below. Supports element highlighting, section box creation, and auto-resolve from within the panel. Uses WarningManagerWindow.ShowSingleton for singleton modeless behaviour.
usecase: User wants to review model health, dismiss warnings, or investigate errors.
notfor: Running error checking rules (use QA Manager / ErrorManagerRunErrorCheckCommand).
postcondition: Warning Manager window is visible and populated with current warnings.
